/CAL:TRIAL/GTWM/VD:TRIAL & LAST DAY OF 05-21-18/CTORD:AS CONDITION OF INFORMAL DIVERSION, DEFENDANT TO HAVE NO NEW CHARGESFOR 6 MONTHS, COMPLETE 8 ANGER MANAGEMENT SESSIONS THAT COUNSEL TO BRING PROOF AND OBEY EXSITING STAYAWAY ORDER,/CTORD: A MODIFICATION OF CPO IS CONDITIONAL UPON SUCCESSFUL COMPLETION OF ANGER MANAGMENT SESSIONS/CONTD:PROGRESS REPORT/DOP/
/CAL: TRIAL READINESS CONFERENCE/X: THIS PROCEEDING IS NOT REPORTED,/NP/X: THE CASE HAS BEEN PRE-TRIED AND THE 05-07-18 TRIAL DATE IN DEPT, 17 IS CONFIRMED,/
